expectations.evidence: Output clearly identifies '.claude/try-claude/' as runtime root in task description and directory structure listing showing the full tree.
Dedicated 'project.json Summary' table with schemaVersion, pluginId, pluginVersion, lastSyncedAt, and managedReferences count. Also listed as key file.

expectations.text: Lists runtime directories (references, plans, reports, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Lists 'Additional runtime subdirectories': plans/, reports/, logs/, codemaps/, humanmaps/, jira-review/. Also shows references/ in the directory tree.

eval_feedback.overall: Solid result without skill guidance. Correctly identified and verified the existing runtime state. Notes Bash was unavailable for re-execution but verified all artifacts. Used more tool calls (14) than with_skill runs.
